title: /kernel:run
summary_text: | Requirement (from `/kernel` contract) | Required behavior | Current run evidence | Status | |---|---|---|---| | Start with multi-lane kernel bootstrap | Launch 6+ active, materially distinct lanes before substantive work | Multiple parallel `spawn_agent`/bridge calls happened, but no 6-way live lane manifest evidence was established in a single confirmed active set | **FAIL** | | Required voices | `codex` + `glm` + one specialist (`gemini-cli`/`cursor-cli`/`copilot`) | `glm` and `copilot` probes succeeded; `gemini-cli` probe failed | **PASS (with caveat: specialist only via `copilot`)** | | Shape legality | Normal mode only if both `glm` and specialist remain active; degraded-allowed only after two `glm` failures and guard-marking | `glm` health has been flapping but later success present; no `glm`-twice-fail degrades recorded | **PASS** | | Bootstrap receipt | `kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh write ...` must run before first acknowledgement | No confirmed run-bound receipt write yet; prior `KERNEL_RUN_ID`/receipt status implied missing/`unknown-run` if unset | **FAIL** | | Receipt environment evidence | Must set `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_ACTIVE_MODELS_CSV`, `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_MANIFEST_LANE_COUNT`, `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_AGENT_LABELS=true`, `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_SUBAGENT_LABELS=true` | Not set yet | **FAIL** | | Active-model live evidence | Receipt should include live models used in the run (not assumptions) | No run-bound receipt written with live model evidence | **FAIL** | | Manifest integrity | At least 6 bullets for **currently active** lanes with provider/agent/subagent fields | No active verified 6-lane manifest has been published | **FAIL** | | Output honesty | Claims like “Kernel is active” should not rely on `--check` alone | `--check` is weak by itself and copilot/lane logs show mixed failures | **FAIL** | Overall: current state is **non-compliant** for bootstrap acknowledgement; main blockers are missing run-bound receipt + unverified 6-lane active manifest with live labels/evidence.
